creator: jedgar@fxp.org
text:
On Mon, Jul 16, 2001 at 05:13:50AM -0700, Andreas Schulz wrote:
> 
> ports/graphics/Cgraph the distinfo is old, but the tar-package
> seems to be repackaged.
> 

a) you might want to inform the maintainer

b) the new distfile is corrupt:

jedgar@darkstar:~$ tar ztvf /usr/ports/distfiles/Cgraph2.04.tar.gz
gzip: stdin: not in gzip format
tar: child returned status 1
jedgar@darkstar:~$ file /usr/ports/distfiles/Cgraph2.04.tar.gz
/usr/ports/distfiles/Cgraph2.04.tar.gz: data

so updating the checksum might be a bad idea.

-- 
Chris D. Faulhaber - jedgar@fxp.org - jedgar@FreeBSD.org
